overview: I upgraded my SAFe Feature Spec System to production on Streamlit Cloud, wired in governance modules, migrated to PostgreSQL, and tested Anthropic's advisor tool. The advisor averaged -2.2 points at 4.3× the cost ($4.98 vs $1.17) — the data said no.

keyPoints.title: Advisor tool scored -2.2 pts avg at 4.3× cost
Connector abstraction replaced brittle Notion MCP dependency
PostgreSQL migration unlocked concurrent multi-surface access
Governance modules were built but unwired until now
